# Minter — Website Design Agency

## Who We Are
Minter is a website design agency that builds professional websites for local businesses — restaurants, home services, salons, medical practices, and fitness studios. We handle everything from design to deployment to ongoing optimization.

**Website:** https://minter-five-green.vercel.app
**Contact Email:** hello@minter.design
**Calendly:** https://calendly.com/minterai/15-minute-web-design-meeting

## Services

### Website Design & Development
Custom, mobile-responsive websites built for conversion. We design in-browser using modern tools and deploy to fast, reliable hosting (Vercel). Every site is optimized for Core Web Vitals and includes basic SEO setup.

**Starting at $1,497** for a complete professional website.

### Monthly Maintenance & Support
Ongoing hosting, updates, security patches, and minor content changes. We also provide a dedicated virtual receptionist service for qualifying businesses.

**Starting at $497/month** — all-in-one retainer includes hosting, AI live chat, minor SEO updates, and unlimited edits.

### Add-Ons
- **AI Live Chat Widget** — Automated Q&A widget trained on your business info. +$97/mo
- **Google Business Profile Optimization** — Audit and optimization of your GBP listing. $247 one-time
- **Advanced SEO Audit** — Full technical SEO report with prioritized fix list. $347 one-time
- **Restaurant Online Ordering** — Setup with Toast, Square Online, or custom WooCommerce. From $497 setup + $97/mo

## Pricing

### All-Inclusive Monthly Retainer — $497/mo
Everything you need to maintain and grow your web presence:
- Hosting & SSL
- Unlimited edits
- AI live chat widget
- Minor SEO updates
- Priority support

### À La Carte Options
- Discovery call: Free
- Professional website: From $1,497
- Monthly hosting & maintenance: From $97/mo
- Advanced SEO audit: $347
- Google Business Profile audit: $247

## Process

1. **Discovery Call** — 15-minute call to understand your business, goals, and current web presence
2. **Design & Build** — We build a custom website based on your brief, typically 5–10 business days
3. **Review & Launch** — You review, we polish, then we deploy to production
4. **Ongoing Support** — Monthly retainer covers hosting, updates, and optimization

## Industries Served
- Restaurants & Food Service
- Home Services (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing)
- Salons & Spas
- Medical & Dental Practices
- Fitness Studios & Personal Trainers
- Professional Services (lawyers, accountants, real estate)

## Target Audience
Busy business owners who want a professional web presence but don't have the time or technical skills to build and maintain one themselves. We position as helpful support — not a sales pitch.

## Location
We work remotely with clients across the United States.
